narrative:
Precinct Monroe North East (precinct in Miami County) has 881 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.1 percentage points.
